message:
perf(router): zero-allocation path matching with stack buffer

Replace heap allocation in match_node hot path:
- Add SegmentRangeIter for zero-allocation segment iteration
- Use 16-element stack buffer for typical paths (≤16 segments)
- Overflow to heap only for unusually deep paths
- Remove intermediate Vec<&str> segment collection

Isomorphism verified: 164/164 router tests pass unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
